stemHtml: What happens as air is cooled to below its dew point temperature?

options.a: The saturated water vapor content increases as precipitation takes place when the temperature drops.
options.b: The actual water vapor content decreases to remain equal to the saturated water vapor content.
options.c: The actual water vapor content increases to remain equal to the saturated water vapor content.
options.d: The saturated water vapor content remains constant as the air is at 100% relative humidity.
